name: AI For Thai API
description: AI For Thai (AIFORTHAI) provides a suite of Thai-language artificial intelligence APIs developed by NECTEC (National Electronics and Computer Technology Center) of Thailand. The platform offers natural language processing, speech processing, image processing, and chatbot services tailored for the Thai language.
